prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: mid-depth interior cutout for scenes 1 and 6 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines the exact handcrafted paper language
Primary request: a simple ancient wooden shelf with several rolled blank book bundles and folded blank papers, plus one narrow paper screen edge; grouped along the right third, complete silhouette with generous padding
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, fibrous paper, restrained ink, matte tea-brown and ivory pigments
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for local removal
Constraints: uniform #ff00ff background only, no shadows or gradients; blank papers with no marks; no people, text, watermark, logo; no #ff00ff in subject; complete crisp edges
Avoid: modern bookshelf, printed symbols, photorealism, glossy 3D
